D1 Optics L4 Analyze Reference

Stefan-Boltzmann's T⁴ Law

integrate the Planck curve and watch total radiated power soar as temperature to the fourth

Adding up the Planck curve over all wavelengths gives the total power a blackbody radiates per unit area — and that integral works out to σT⁴.

Set a temperature and a reference temperature. The quartic curve is exitance vs T; the gold readout gives the ratio M/M_ref = (T/T_ref)⁴ — note how fast it climbs.
